title: sesamum calycinum subsp. baumii
intro: Sesamum calycinum subsp. baumii, also known as the Indian jujube or Egyptian jujube, is a plant species in the sesame family that is native to Africa. The medicinal properties of Sesamum calycinum subsp. baumii include its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which have been utilized in traditional medicine for centuries. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to treat various health conditions such as fever, digestive issues, and skin problems. Sesamum calycinum subsp. baumii can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
